essence: Creates photographic images for editorial, commercial, and artistic purposes using technical and creative skills.

identity.title: Photographer
identity.summary: Plans shoots, captures images, edits photos, and delivers visual content for clients, publications, or personal projects.

salary.notes: Specialist commercial or editorial photographers can earn substantially more through commissions and licensing.

qualifications: Portfolio demonstrating technical and creative ability
Experience with camera systems, lighting, and post‑processing
Good client management and project planning skills
Ability to work across studio and location environments

lifestyle.description: Project‑based work with variable hours, travel, and a mix of creative and client‑facing tasks.

habits: Edits and retouches images for delivery
